raw_text:
Hello,

I'm Tom from TechGear Pro. We'd like to partner with you for a TikTok campaign.

We need 2 TikTok videos showcasing our new wireless earbuds. Timeline is flexible — around 4 weeks. Our budget for this is USD 800. Payment will be made within 14 days of content approval.

Let me know if you're interested.

Tom Lee
Marketing Lead, TechGear Pro
